channel.title: Vscode on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Vscode on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: vscode: Insiders (version 1.111)
item.description:
The provided content only includes the title and a link, without any release note details to summarize.

  • Source: Visual Studio Code

item.title: github: Figma MCP server can now generate design layers from VS Code
item.description:
GitHub Copilot in VS Code can now connect to the Figma MCP server to use Figma design context while coding and to export rendered UI back to Figma as editable frames.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code v1.110 – February release
item.description:
Changelog entry for GitHub Copilot in VS Code v1.110 (February 2026) indicates improvements that make Copilot agents more practical for longer-running, more complex tasks, with more control over agent execution and new extensibility options.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: vscode: Making agents practical for real-world development
item.description:
VS Code 1.110 describes changes aimed at making coding agents more usable in real workflows, focusing on orchestration, extensibility, and session continuity.

  • Source: Visual Studio Code

item.title: vscode: February 2026 Insiders (version 1.110)
item.description:
Insufficient information to summarize: only the article title, URL, and a generic “learn what is new” line were provided, without release note details.

  • Source: Visual Studio Code

item.title: vscode: Building Long-Distance Next Edit Suggestions
item.description:
VS Code describes extending GitHub Copilot Next Edit Suggestions so they can propose edits across an entire file rather than only nearby locations.

  • Source: Visual Studio Code
